content.en:
After creating the pinnacle Ultimate Arcane Armagine's Armor, Ye Tian's defensive ability reached an incredible level.

Now, he stood still, and it was difficult for those ancient demon-level powerhouses to attack and break through his defenses.

"It is worthy of the pinnacle-level ultimate arcane, if I create the pinnacle-level ultimate arcane of the attack type, my attack power will definitely reach an unimaginable level, and I am 100% confident that I can defeat Amusha, who is the number one on the emperor list!"

Ye Tian muttered.

In addition, he is now also researching his own form secret method.

Although the true Lin form is good, it is actually not his own form secret method, but the form secret method created by other ultimate ancient demons or peak-level ancient demon powerhouses, which is not in line with him, and the higher the cultivation realm, it is actually hindering his breakthrough.

Therefore, if you create a secret method that fits your own form, you can really not affect your breakthrough, and you can also make your own strength get a terrifying improvement!

this day.

Ye Tian comprehended the ultimate ancient demon scale, and had a new understanding, he realized a new life pattern from this scale, and let his own life pattern complete the transformation, so that the ultimate way of ten thousand laws also transformed.

Rumble!!!!

Ye Tian's body began to undergo a slight transformation in 377, although the transformation was not large, but his strength had improved a lot.

"My life pattern is no less than that of a top-level ancient demon-level powerhouse!"

Ye Tian muttered.

You must know that he has not yet broken through to the Ancient Demon level, let alone the top Ancient Demon level, if he breaks through in the future, the life pattern will be automatically optimized.

Therefore, the emperor-level realm has a top-level ancient demon-level life pattern, which is very terrifying, and the descendants of those ultimate ancient demons are difficult to reach this level of life pattern strength.

The life pattern of a top-level Ancient Demon-level powerhouse, coupled with the Ultimate Rule Realm, and the pinnacle Ultimate Arcane, if he creates a form secret method that fits his own generation, his combat power may be able to achieve the invincibility of ordinary Ancient Demon-level, or even inferior to the weaker top-level Ancient Demon-level powerhouse.

If it was in the Huoxi space-time battlefield, the top ancient demon-level powerhouse would definitely not be his opponent, and he would be killed by him when he encountered him.

In the following years, Ye Tian has been cultivating and attaining enlightenment in the Aromu Fortress and has never gone out.

The advantage of the Emperor List powerhouse is that he does not need to do tasks, there are no requirements to bind, and the tasks of the Dragon Disciple Warband will not affect him. So, he can stay in the Aromu Fortress and cultivate.

Before you know it, many ancient demon eras have passed.

And during this time, the Doha Ancient Demon was very annoyed, because Ye Tian had not come out, even if he wanted to invite the top few ordinary Ancient Demon level powerhouses to make a move, there was no chance.

Otherwise, he is really willing to spend most of his wealth, please use those few people to kill Ye Tian.

this day.

Ye Tian finally created the second peak ultimate arcane, and he named it Ah Luo Mu Sword Light!

The sword light of Arromu is much more powerful than Arromu's Blade, and both its attack speed and destructive power are far superior to Arromu's Blade.

Moreover, the sword light of Aromu can also be differentiated into sword lights, but the more sword lights are differentiated, the power of a single sword light will decrease.

But if you face many strong people and divide the sword light of Aromu, you can kill many strong people at the same time, so that they can't escape.

In short, after creating the sword light of Aromu, Ye Tian's combat power has skyrocketed a lot, and there should be no problem surpassing Amusha.

"Now, I have two pinnacle-level ultimate arcane arts, there is no need to continue to create, and then I will work hard to create a form secret method that suits me, but I need to learn from many form secret methods to gain enough insights from them!"

As a result, Ye Tian began to use the battle points to exchange one form after another secret method in the Arrow Mu Fortress.

These form secret methods were not precious, and Ye Tian had exchanged a lot of them in a short period of time.

However, since he didn't have many remaining battle points, he couldn't exchange too many form secret inheritances.

......

Outside the Stronghold of Arromu.

Ye Tian went out to find the emperor-level powerhouses of the other main departments, and killed him when he saw it, and the news of his departure from the Arrow Mu Fortress naturally spread.

Dom Fortress.

When the Doha Ancient Demon learned that Ye Tian had come out, he immediately revealed his killing intent and immediately summoned the three Ancient Demon-level powerhouses.

Soon.

Three ancient demon-level powerhouses came, namely Nuchi Ancient Demon, Haying Ancient Demon, and Aoying Ancient Demon.

Among them, Nuchi Ancient Demon's strength is the most powerful, although he is not a top ancient demon-level powerhouse, but he has also comprehended the prototype of the Ultimate Rule Realm, and he is only one step away from comprehending the Ultimate Rule Realm.

The ancient demon of Doha is specially the main department of Dom, and he invited this person over.

And Nuchi Ancient Demon used to be a powerhouse on the Emperor List, but the highest ranking was fifty-one on the Emperor List, but this was already very powerful.

Now, the Nuchi Ancient Demon had cultivated a form secret method to the consummation of the third form, coupled with the power of the rudimentary form of the Ultimate Rule Realm, as well as several top-notch ultimate arcane arts.

Therefore, his current combat power is extremely terrifying.

Of course, this is the Huoxi space-time battlefield, and the strength of the ancient demon-level powerhouse has been suppressed a lot, but the Nuchi Ancient Demon still has the confidence to kill Ye Tian.

However, in order to ensure that Ye Tian could be killed, the Doha Ancient Demon still invited the Haying Ancient Demon and the Aoying Ancient Demon, which were slightly weaker than the Nuchi Ancient Demon, to come.

"Three, you should be able to kill the second existence on the Emperor List of the Aromu Fortress, right?" said the Doha Ancient Demon.

Nuchi Ancient Demon said: "Actually, I can do it alone, but if you ask us to act together, then we will also join forces." With our strength, even if we are suppressed by the Huoxi space-time battlefield, there is no problem in killing the first place on the emperor list, let alone killing the second place on the emperor list!"

"You have to be serious, that day is not simple, he has comprehended the ultimate rule realm, not to be underestimated!" said the Doha Ancient Demon.

"Don't worry, we understand!"

Nuchi Ancient Demon Path.

"The previous remuneration deposit will be given to you, and after the task is completed, the rest of the remuneration will also be given to you. "

"The sky has come out of the fortress of Aromu, you go quickly!"

Doha's Ancient Magic Path.

"Good!"

The three Nuchi Ancient Demons quickly left the Dom Fortress and went to attack and kill Ye Tian.

......

Ye Tian most likely guessed that the powerhouse of Dom Fortress would attack and kill him, but he was not worried about anything, after all, there were regulations in the Huoxi space-time battlefield, and the top ancient demon-level powerhouses were not allowed to attack the emperor list or even the emperor-level powerhouses.

And ordinary ancient demon-level powerhouses, he is not afraid, even if some ancient demon-level powerhouses are very demonic, he can escape if he can't beat them.
